{{Quote|So, like I was saying, if the Separatists are as bad as you all pretend they are, I'll eat my hat and retire to Tatooine.|Daggath Darklighter|<ref name="Disapproval" />}}
'''Daggath Darklighter''', nicknamed '''Dag''', was a member of the [[Cularin Militia]] during its conflict with the [[Thaereian military|Navy of Thaere]]. Originally a native of [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]], Darklighter moved to the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] after viewing images of the devastating [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatist]] [[Battle of Cerea|attack]] on Cerea.<ref name="Disapproval" />

{{Char-stub}}
